---
description: "Use when writing React Native components or screens. Covers Expo conventions and component patterns."
applyTo: ["src/**/*.tsx", "src/**/*.ts", "App.tsx"]
---

# React Native / Expo Conventions

- Use functional components with TypeScript
- Import from `expo-*` packages for native features
- Use the theme palette from `src/theme/palette.ts` for colors
- Types live in `src/types/resume.ts`
- Keep components small and focused
